response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience in C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital markets domains, which are critical for this role. Their expertise in modern web technologies and open-source projects is impressive but not fully aligned with the job requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, etc.).
Proven ability to work in high-performance, low-latency environments (e.g., at Dunnhumby media).
Strong communication skills and community involvement (workshops, talks, open-source contributions).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, especially on Windows (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments).
No evident domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking.
Most recent roles focus on web/mobile development, not the specialized financial systems required.
